title: Brathys acerosa
taxonomy: Brathys acerosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It belongs to the genus Brathys, which is a small group of plants native to the Mediterranean region. The plant's classification is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. This classification system is based on the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships. As a member of the Boraginaceae family, Brathys acerosa shares similarities with other plants in this group, such as forget-me-nots and borage.
